name: Mff Capital Investments Limited
analysis: MFF has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$4.9737. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
